expectations.evidence: Skill Reference lists 'Workflow: workflows/sync-bmad-documents.md (bidirectional sync between local BMAD docs and Jira/Confluence)'

expectations.text: Uses sync.mjs status to verify the document is linked to PROJ-100
expectations.evidence: Step 3: 'node <skill-path>/scripts/sync.mjs status docs/epics/platform-epic.md' and checks linked status

expectations.text: Uses sync.mjs pull to fetch remote changes
Reports which sections/fields were updated in the local document
expectations.evidence: Step 9 presents a summary table with columns Action, Section/Field, Result showing pulled sections like 'Overview', 'Story 1.1', 'Story 1.4'

expectations.text: For epic docs, handles child story tickets if any exist remotely
expectations.evidence: Step 8: 'For an epic document, the pull handles child stories automatically: New remote child tickets (stories added in Jira under DO-100) are appended as new story sections in the local doc'
